notes: P67 is contract-only and defines future query privacy and poisoning guard decisions.
No runtime guard, persistent store, telemetry, account tracking, IP tracking, public query logging, query-intelligence mutation, index mutation, external calls, or live probes are added.
P68 demand dashboard remains future/contract-only and may use only privacy-filtered, poisoning-guarded aggregate inputs; no runtime aggregation, telemetry, real demand claim, or mutation is added.
P69 source sync workers remain future/contract-only; no public-query fanout, connector runtime, source cache/evidence ledger mutation, candidate mutation, or index mutation is added.
P70 source cache/evidence ledger remains future/contract-only and does not mutate query-intelligence records.
